statements.select:
SELECT C.CTID ,convert(varchar,A.ZIPCODE) ZIPCODE ,A.ZIPCODE2 ,concat(A.ZIPCODE,A.ZIPCODE2) ZIPCODE6 ,CASE WHEN A.ZIPCODE_N IS NOT NULL THEN A.CITY ELSE C.CTNAME END CTNAME ,CASE WHEN A.ZIPCODE_N IS NOT NULL THEN A.AREA ELSE B.ZIPNAME END ZIPNAME ,A.ROAD ,A.NOTE FROM dbo.ID_ZIP2 A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.ID_ZIP B WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.ZIPCODE=A.ZIPCODE JOIN dbo.ID_CITY C WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.CTID=B.CTID WHERE 1=1
AND dbo.FN_GZIP3(A.ZIPCODE)+dbo.FN_GZIP2(A.ZIPCODE2) LIKE '%'+ #CTIDZIP# +'%'
AND C.CTID=#CTID#
AND (1!=1 OR ISNULL(dbo.FN_GZIP3(A.ZIPCODE),'')=#ZIPCODE# OR ISNULL(A.AREA,'')=#ZIPNAME# OR ISNULL(B.ZIPNAME,'')=#ZIPNAME# )
AND A.ROAD LIKE '%'+#ROAD#+'%'
ORDER BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7

SELECT C.CTID ,convert(varchar,A.ZIPCODE) ZIPCODE ,SUBSTRING(a.zipcode6,4,3) ZIPCODE2 ,A.ZIPCODE6 ,c.CTNAME ,b.ZIPNAME ,A.ROAD ,A.NOTE FROM dbo.ID_ZIP6 A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.ID_ZIP B WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.ZIPCODE=A.ZIPCODE JOIN dbo.ID_CITY C WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.CTID=B.CTID WHERE 1=1
AND A.ZIPCODE6 LIKE '%'+ #CTIDZIP# +'%'
AND C.CTID=#CTID#
AND (1!=1 OR ISNULL(dbo.FN_GZIP3(A.ZIPCODE),'')=#ZIPCODE# OR ISNULL(A.AREA,'')=#ZIPNAME# OR ISNULL(B.ZIPNAME,'')=#ZIPNAME# )
AND A.ROAD LIKE '%'+#ROAD#+'%'
ORDER BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7

SELECT A.HN3ID /*PK*/ ,A.SUBJECT ,AC.NAME MODIFYNAME ,A.STOPSDATE ,A.STOPEDATE ,A.POSTDATE /*,CONVERT(VARCHAR, A.STOPSDATE, 120) STOPSDATE ,CONVERT(VARCHAR, A.STOPEDATE, 120) STOPEDATE ,CONVERT(VARCHAR, A.POSTDATE, 111) POSTDATE */ FROM HOME_NEWS3 A JOIN AUTH_ACCOUNT AC ON AC.ACCOUNT = A.MODIFYACCT WHERE 1=1 AND A.ISDELETE IS NULL /*顯示未刪除的資料*/ AND A.POSTDATE <= GETDATE() /*發佈日之後*/ AND A.STOPSDATE <= GETDATE() /*過啟動日*/ AND A.STOPEDATE >= GETDATE() /*有效時間內*/ ORDER BY A.STOPSDATE, A.STOPEDATE
